/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/SylvaniaLauncher_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/core/ConfigManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/core/SoundManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/core/NotesManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/ui/WowButton.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/ui/NotesWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/ui/RealmlistWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/ui/DownloadDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/ui/SettingsDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/ui/ServerEditDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/ui/AddonsWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/utils/PathUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/utils/ZipExtractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/core/HdPatchManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/src/core/WineManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SylvaniaLauncher.dir/SylvaniaLauncher_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o SylvaniaLauncher  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.2.4 -lzip /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.2.4
